scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix shell" "npm run dev --prefix apps/analytics" "npm run dev --prefix apps/users" "npm run dev --prefix apps/settings"
scripts.preview:all: concurrently "npm run preview --prefix apps/analytics" "npm run preview --prefix apps/users" "npm run preview --prefix apps/settings" "npm run preview --prefix shell"
scripts.install:all: npm i --prefix shell && npm i --prefix apps/analytics && npm i --prefix apps/users && npm i --prefix apps/settings
